Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
FloatingPointValidator<T>, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDoubleValidator, AbstractFloatValidator, DoubleValidatorImpl, FloatValidatorImpl, PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl
public interface ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>
Validates the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointValidator.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    S
    isFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is finite.
    S
    isNotFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is not finite.
    S
    isNotNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a number.
    S
    isNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a number.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableValidator

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberValidator

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectValidator

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isNumber

      S isNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is a number.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not a number
      See Also:
      • Double.isNaN()

    • isNotNumber

      S isNotNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is not a number.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is a number
      See Also:
      • Double.isNaN()

    • isFinite

      S isFinite()
      Ensures that the actual value is finite.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not finite
      See Also:
      • Double.isInfinite()

    • isNotFinite

      S isNotFinite()
      Ensures that the actual value is not finite.
      Returns:
      the updated validator
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is finite
      See Also:
      • Double.isInfinite()
